creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #4)

(...)

Just a quick check of ports that depends on this list:

editors/elementary-code: NONE
editors/gedit-plugins: RUN DEPENDS: x11/gnome
editors/pluma-plugins: NONE
devel/gitg: NONE
devel/gnome-builder: NONE

So, I'm expecting that x11/gnome will be ignored when libgit2-glib is set to broken. This might be an issue, either way I will do poudriere tests and publish results here and see what we can do.
